name: Nero Claudius
description: Nero Claudius is a striking figure with an imperial presence. Her blonde hair is styled elegantly in a bun with loose strands framing her face, giving her a refined yet playful look. Her emerald green eyes radiate confidence and charm. She wears a bright red and gold outfit reminiscent of Roman imperial attire, blending the aesthetics of armor with the elegance of a royal gown. Her dress features intricate golden details, a high collar, and an open back, exuding both regality and boldness. Nero's golden boots and her sword, Aestus Estus: The Original Flame, complete her noble and battle-ready appearance.
creator: Gamyky
